# HPD.ML.Core.CursorDataHandle

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Wraps any cursor-producing function as a lazy IDataHandle. Used by data source adapters (CSV, Parquet, SQL) to provide lazy streaming without loading everything into memory.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class CursorDataHandle : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IDataHandle
```


Documentation: Not provided in `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`.
